text: Aaj hospital ka bill dekha aur mera dimaag sunn ho gaya, saari savings ek pal mein khatam ho gayi. Papa ki kirana shop pehle hi doob chuki hai aur ab neighborhood mein log taane denge, ye soch kar mujhe itni ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki main saans nahi le paa rahi. Is waqt career ya bache ki school fees ka koi plan nahi sujh raha, bas rona aa raha hai aur darr lag raha hai.

Office mein login kiya par screen bilkul dhundli lag rahi hai kyunki dimaag mein bas wahi debt spiral ghoom raha hai. Medical bill ne bachi-kuchi himmat bhi tod di aur ab lag raha hai ki main apne parivaar ki 'izzat' kabhi nahi bacha paungi. Main logically kuch nahi soch paa rahi ki EMI kaise bhari jayegi, bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah beh gayi hoon.

Sasural mein sabke samne muskurane ki koshish kar rahi hoon par andar se main bilkul toot chuki hoon kyunki hamari shop ka loss ab sambhal nahi raha. Hospital ke kharche ne saari jama-poonji saaf kar di aur ab mujhe bas ek gehra despair mehsus ho raha hai. Is waqt main koi solution ya backup plan nahi soch sakti, bas ek gehra sannata hai jo mujhe andar se kha raha hai.

MNC ki job aur ghar ke beech pehle hi pishi hui thi, aur aaj is medical bill ne mujhe emotional breakdown ki kagar par khada kar diya hai. Dimaag blank ho gaya hai aur bas wahi kirana shop ki nakami baar-baar yaad aa rahi hai jisse neighborhood mein humari thoo-thoo hui thi. Mujhse ab kaam nahi ho raha, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai jisne mujhe jhakad liya hai aur main bas rona chahti hoon.

Sarkari naukri toh mili nahi aur ab is private job ki salary aane se pehle hi hospital bills mein chali gayi, main poori tarah sunn ho chuki hoon. Suppressed ambition toh door ki baat hai, mujhe ab apna wajood hi ek bojh lag raha hai aur dimaag mein koi rasta nahi dikh raha. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas ek gehra sadma hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.
